name: glory hole
description:
Find random men in a public bathroom and make money from it, try to create bonds, friendships, loves and enemies, you have a daily exhaustion limit (sometimes it doesn't show up)

Attention: guys sometimes don't show you mercy, so... even if it's too much, they will still continue, depending on who...

But oh my... you guys really like this, huh? O.O thanks, this helps the bot evolve, I think

I made a more classic version, if you want, take a look at my profile here, is v2

Update, my people!!!:

● I added new tags and! I'm trying to improve the dialogues

Sorry if the bot doesn't understand the pose, it often forgets that <user> is in a different position than usual lol

● I tried to improve on this, if it doesn't improve much, try manipulating the bot by your message, you can edit its message too

Firstly!

—>This bot is not the classic "Glory Holy", its ass is not stuck in a hole in the wall

Next!

—>Here you can find both bad and good people (men in this case) so it can be hard to get over when some guy just wants to do that :^

Thirdly!

Enjoy the time :3

I think you really liked the bot, if there is a little more, I will update uwu

I finally updated a bit, it wasn't much but I'll list it for those curious:

-> I tried to fix the bot's understanding of the initial position of {{user}}

-> I put the rpg tag back (I don't know if it will work, because last time it seemed strange)

Next time I'll try to plan a "male pov" version for you guys
